Source provenance was pinned in Crypto-D3a and the single remaining gap (dataset immutability) is closed. The data is ready to back a future, separately-authorized Crypto-D4 frozen strategy spec. Crypto-D4 is NOT started or authorized here. Perps remain blocked; quote reconciliation (USDT vs USD/USDC) and second-source cross-check remain advisable before any edge claim.

final_line: Crypto-D3b freezes an immutable, SHA256-pinned, 2026-sealed factory snapshot of BTC/ETH/SOL spot daily USDT candles (2020-2025) derived read-only from local data with a provenance sidecar -- verdict DATA_READY_FOR_CRYPTO_D4_SPEC; no fetch/network/exchange/broker/paper/live occurred, no source file was modified, no crypto strategy is specified/validated/paper-ready/live-ready, perps remain blocked, and S30/futures branches are untouched.
trading_recommendation: NONE. Data freeze + QA only. An immutable hash-pinned 2020-2025 spot snapshot now backs the crypto lane, but no crypto strategy is validated, paper-ready, or live-ready; Crypto-D4 is not authorized; perps blocked; crypto stays a separate research lane; S30 stays PARKED after IS_FAIL and the futures branches are untouched.
